title: 現在簡單式 do / does 問句與否定句 50 題

questions.prompt: ____ your brother play basketball after school?
questions.explanation: your brother 是第三人稱單數，問句要用 Does。

questions.prompt: Do they ____ lunch at school?
questions.explanation: Do 後面的動詞要用原形，所以選 eat。

questions.prompt: She ____ like onions.
questions.explanation: She 是第三人稱單數，否定句要用 doesn't。

questions.prompt: Does Tom ____ to school by bus?
questions.explanation: Does 後面的動詞要用原形，所以選 go。

questions.prompt: We ____ watch TV on weekdays.
questions.explanation: We 要搭配 don't，後面接原形動詞 watch。

questions.prompt: ____ Mary brush her teeth before bed?
questions.explanation: Mary 是第三人稱單數，問句開頭用 Does。

questions.prompt: My parents ____ drink coffee at night.
questions.explanation: My parents 是複數，否定句要用 don't。

questions.prompt: Does he ____ English every day?
questions.explanation: Does 已經表示第三人稱單數，後面的動詞要還原成 study。

questions.prompt: ____ you take the bus to school?
questions.explanation: you 的現在簡單式問句要用 Do。

questions.prompt: The dog doesn't ____ in the house.
questions.explanation: doesn't 後面的動詞要用原形 sleep。

questions.prompt: Do your classmates ____ homework after dinner?
questions.explanation: Do 後面的主要動詞要用原形 do。

questions.prompt: He ____ go to bed late.
questions.explanation: He 是第三人稱單數，否定句用 doesn't。

questions.prompt: ____ Lisa have a piano lesson on Saturday?
questions.explanation: Lisa 是第三人稱單數，問句用 Does。

questions.prompt: I don't ____ breakfast on Sundays.
questions.explanation: don't 後面的動詞要用原形 cook。

questions.prompt: Does your sister ____ a diary?
questions.explanation: Does 後面接原形動詞 write。

questions.prompt: They ____ speak Japanese.
questions.explanation: They 是複數，否定句用 don't。

questions.prompt: ____ the teacher give tests every week?
questions.explanation: the teacher 是第三人稱單數，問句要用 Does。

questions.prompt: Do cats ____ fish?
questions.explanation: Do 後面接原形動詞 like。

questions.prompt: My uncle doesn't ____ a car.
questions.explanation: doesn't 後面的動詞要用原形 drive。

questions.prompt: ____ we need our English books today?
questions.explanation: we 的問句要用 Do。

questions.prompt: Does the store ____ at nine?
questions.explanation: Does 後面的動詞要用原形 open。

questions.prompt: You ____ need an umbrella today.
questions.explanation: you 的否定句要用 don't。

questions.prompt: ____ Peter and Jack play soccer together?
questions.explanation: Peter and Jack 是兩個人，問句要用 Do。

questions.prompt: Sally doesn't ____ her room every day.
questions.explanation: doesn't 後面的動詞要用原形 clean。

questions.prompt: Do the students ____ carefully in class?
questions.explanation: Do 後面接原形動詞 listen。

questions.prompt: The baby ____ cry at night.
questions.explanation: The baby 是第三人稱單數，否定句用 doesn't。

questions.prompt: ____ your mother cook dinner?
questions.explanation: your mother 是第三人稱單數，問句用 Does。

questions.prompt: Does Anna ____ to music after school?
questions.explanation: Does 後面的動詞要用原形 listen。

questions.prompt: We don't ____ fast in the hallway.
questions.explanation: don't 後面的動詞要用原形 run。

questions.prompt: ____ Mr. Lin work in Taipei?
questions.explanation: Mr. Lin 是第三人稱單數，問句要用 Does。

questions.prompt: Do you ____ your grandparents on weekends?
questions.explanation: Do 後面的動詞要用原形 visit。

questions.prompt: The boys ____ play computer games on Monday.
questions.explanation: The boys 是複數，否定句用 don't。

questions.prompt: Does the bus ____ near your house?
questions.explanation: Does 後面的動詞要用原形 stop。

questions.prompt: ____ I need to bring my notebook?
questions.explanation: I 的現在簡單式問句通常用 Do。

questions.prompt: My friend doesn't ____ vegetables.
questions.explanation: doesn't 後面的動詞要用原形 like。

questions.prompt: Do the girls ____ songs in music class?
questions.explanation: Do 後面接原形動詞 sing。

questions.prompt: ____ your father read the newspaper every morning?
questions.explanation: your father 是第三人稱單數，問句用 Does。

questions.prompt: She doesn't ____ her bike to school.
questions.explanation: doesn't 後面的動詞要用原形 ride。

questions.prompt: Do we ____ enough time?
questions.explanation: Do 後面的動詞要用原形 have。

questions.prompt: The library ____ open on Sundays.
questions.explanation: The library 是第三人稱單數，否定句用 doesn't。

questions.prompt: ____ your friends live near here?
questions.explanation: your friends 是複數，問句要用 Do。

questions.prompt: Does Jack ____ his homework before dinner?
questions.explanation: Does 後面的主要動詞要用原形 do。

questions.prompt: I ____ use my phone in class.
questions.explanation: I 的現在簡單式否定句要用 don't。

questions.prompt: Do birds ____ in the morning?
questions.explanation: Do 後面接原形動詞 sing。

questions.prompt: ____ Emma wash her hair every day?
questions.explanation: Emma 是第三人稱單數，問句用 Does。

questions.prompt: Our teacher doesn't ____ angry often.
questions.explanation: doesn't 後面的動詞要用原形 get。

questions.prompt: Do you and your brother ____ the same room?
questions.explanation: you and your brother 是複數意思，問句用 Do，動詞用原形 share。

questions.prompt: Does the train ____ at 8:30?
questions.explanation: Does 後面的動詞要用原形 arrive。

questions.prompt: My classmates ____ eat lunch in the classroom.
questions.explanation: My classmates 是複數，否定句用 don't。

questions.prompt: ____ he call his grandmother every week?
questions.explanation: he 是第三人稱單數，問句用 Does。
